key_models.crm.lead: Lead/Opportunity. Inherits: mail.thread.cc, mail.thread.blacklist, mail.thread.phone, mail.activity.mixin, utm.mixin, format.address.mixin, mail.tracking.duration.mixin. Key fields: stage_id, probability, automated_probability, team_id, user_id, partner_id, expected_revenue, campaign_id, medium_id, source_id.
key_models.crm.stage: Pipeline stage. Fields: name, sequence, is_won, rotting_threshold_days, team_ids, fold.
key_models.crm.lead.scoring.frequency: PLS frequency per (team_id, variable, value). Fields: variable, value, won_count (Float +0.1), lost_count (Float +0.1), team_id.
key_models.crm.lead.scoring.frequency.field: Configurable PLS field. Fields: name, field_id (ir.model.fields on crm.lead), color.
key_models.crm.team: Sales team with assignment config. Fields: assignment_enabled, assignment_domain, assignment_max, use_leads, use_opportunities.
key_models.crm.team.member: Team member with personal assignment config. Fields: assignment_domain, assignment_domain_preferred, assignment_optout, assignment_max, lead_day_count, lead_month_count.
key_models.crm.iap.lead.mining.request: Lead mining request. Fields: lead_number (max 200), search_type (companies/people), lead_type, team_id, user_id, country_ids, industry_ids, role_ids, seniority_id.

key_files.crm/models/crm_lead.py: Core lead model with PLS (1537+ lines)

crons.website_crm_score_cron: PLS recompute (daily, inactive by default). Model: crm.lead, method: _cron_update_automated_probabilities
crons.ir_cron_crm_lead_assign: Lead assignment (daily, inactive by default). Model: crm.team, method: _cron_assign_leads
crons.ir_cron_lead_enrichment: Lead enrichment (periodic, configurable). Model: crm.lead, method: _iap_enrich_leads_cron

security_groups.sales_team.group_sale_salesman: Own leads CRU, stage read, lost reason read
security_groups.sales_team.group_sale_manager: All leads CRUD, stage CRUD, lost reason CRUD
security_groups.sales_team.group_sale_salesman_all_leads: See all leads (combined with salesman rule)
